title: Oxydectes orbignyana

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Bioactive constituents of Oxydectes orbignyana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are employed in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, as well as in the production of traditional remedies.
